sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53409" key="ka/rpeuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάρπ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n53409.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fruit</tr_>, in pl., dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0340.tlg001:2:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sosith.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
